creator: Marina Temkin
title: (No AI) How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
dc:creator: Marina Temkin
content: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.
contentSnippet: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

creator: Julie Bort
title: (No AI) Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
dc:creator: Julie Bort
content: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.
contentSnippet: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

title: (No AI) AI failure could trigger the next financial crisis, warns Elizabeth Warren
author: Lauren Feiner
content:
![Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA)](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/25563184/2160975539.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

"I know a bubble when I see one."

That's what Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), who led the push to create a new consumer financial regulator in the wake of the 2008 recession, told a crowd at a Vanderbilt Policy Accelerator event in Washington, DC on Wednesday. Warren warned of what she called "striking" parallels to that crisis in the AI industry. While she believes the technology has "enormous potential," she warned that AI companies' massive spending and borrowing practices are creating a tinderbox and Congress should step in.

Though the AI industry has grown rapidly, Warren said the pace isn't keeping up with their spending, requiring the …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/policy/917026/ai-economy-bubble-elizabeth-warren)

title: (No AI) OpenAI now lets teams make custom bots that can do work on their own
author: Jay Peters
content:
![Chat GPT logo on a graphic green background.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/08/STK155_OPEN_AI_4_CVirginia_B.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

OpenAI is giving users of its Business, Enterprise, Edu, and Teachers plans access to cloud-based "workspace" agents available in ChatGPT that can perform business tasks. In [its blog post](https://openai.com/index/introducing-workspace-agents-in-chatgpt/), OpenAI gives examples of agents like one that [finds product feedback on the web](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bk2H8WfHZZk) and sends a report in Slack and a sales agent that [can draft follow-up emails](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HJlME6S-LJc) in Gmail.

These new agents follow increasing interest in agents across the AI landscape, especially after OpenClaw - the AI agent formerly known as Clawdbot and Moltbot that [touts itself](https://openclaw.ai/) as the "AI that actually does things" - [went viral](https://www.theverge.com/report/869004/moltbot-clawdbot-local-ai-agent). OpenClaw founder Peter Steinberger [now works for OpenAI](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/879623/openclaw-founder-peter-steinberger-joins-openai). OpenA …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/917065/openai-chatgpt-workspace-agents-custom-teams-bots)

title: (No AI) Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
content: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.
contentSnippet: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.

title: (No AI) Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
content: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
contentSnippet: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.

title: (No AI) Partnering with industry leaders to accelerate AI transformation
content: Google DeepMind partners with global consultancies to bring the power of frontier AI to organizations around the world.

title: (No AI) Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
content: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

creator: Will Knight
title: (No AI) 5 AI Models Tried to Scam Me. Some of Them Were Scary Good
dc:creator: Will Knight
content: The cyber capabilities of AI models have experts rattled. AI’s social skills may be just as dangerous.
contentSnippet: The cyber capabilities of AI models have experts rattled. AI’s social skills may be just as dangerous.

creator: Andy Greenberg, Matt Burgess
title: (No AI) AI Tools Are Helping Mediocre North Korean Hackers Steal Millions
dc:creator: Andy Greenberg, Matt Burgess
content: One group of hackers used AI for everything from vibe coding their malware to creating fake company websites—and stole as much as $12 million in three months.
contentSnippet: One group of hackers used AI for everything from vibe coding their malware to creating fake company websites—and stole as much as $12 million in three months.
